programme.desc: CHI AL SHAQAB presented by Longines 2026, taking place from 18 to 22 February 2026, features world-class equestrian competition at the Al Shaqab venue in Doha. programme.desc: Levante UD have won just one of their last nine LaLiga matches against Sevilla, a 3-0 victory in their last encounter in January 2026. programme.title: Rayo Vallecano vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Rayo Vallecano have lost their last four LaLiga matches against Espanyol, failing to score in the last two. programme.title: Lorient vs Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30

programme.title: Metz vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Metz have won 68% of their matches against Paris FC in all competitions, their highest ratio against any opponent they have faced at least 15 times. There has never been a draw in seven Ligue 1 meetings between the two teams, with these encounters producing an average of four goals per game. programme.title: Elche vs Atletico Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Elche have not lost any of their last two LaLiga matches against Atlético de Madrid, after losing the previous 11, and could go three or more without defeat against them in the competition for the first time since February 1969. programme.title: Elche vs Atletico Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
programme.desc: Elche have not lost any of their last two LaLiga matches against Atlético de Madrid, after losing the previous 11, and could go three or more without defeat against them in the competition for the first time since February 1969. Atlético de Madrid lost on their last visit to Elche in LaLiga, 1-0 in May 2023, after winning each of their previous five, while the last time they lost two consecutive away games against them in the competition was in September 1975.

programme.title: Nantes vs Montpellier - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Shahania vs Al Arabi - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W20
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. programme.title: Playoffs SF Leg 2 - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Weekly Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.
